source_change: SimpleEngine routes text-only MiMo chat through the loaded language_model instead of mlx_vlm.generate; media requests remain on the honest unsupported/unwired MLLM path.

long_prompt_first_request.before: RemoteDisconnected plus Metal OOM kIOGPUCommandBufferCallbackErrorOutOfMemory on first request
long_prompt_first_request.after: HTTP 200, content=BLUE-CAT-742., prompt_tokens=1743, completion_tokens=23, elapsed_s=37.278, server healthy afterward

tool_required.after: HTTP 200, parsed tool_call record_fact({value: blue-cat}), prompt_tokens=265, completion_tokens=55, elapsed_s=35.372

release_boundary: Text-only MiMo runtime is materially improved but not release-cleared. Long-prompt OOM and tool parse are fixed for this focused simple-engine route; speed, exactness, cache/L2 proof, source-vs-quant, packaged/UI parity, and media remain open.
